name: Lemon Sage Red Snapper
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Lightly grease a shallow baking dish large enough to hold the fish in a single layer.
3. Season the fish on both sides with salt and pepper. Place in the prepared dish. Arrange lemon slices over the fillets, sprinkle with scallion, then top with sage. Dot with butter. Pour broth into the dish.
4. Bake the fish, basting occasionally with pan juices, for 10-12 minutes, or until opaque at its thickest part when tested with a fork.
5. Transfer fish to serving plates, spoon some pan juices over the fish, and serve immediately.
